creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Morning,

Getting weird crashes inside different parts of libllvm.  If I nuke /usr/obj and try again, it fails somewhere else.

Would be surprised if it's a hardware issue as this is the only thing that breaks- very reliable server running zfs, so I feel data corruption is unlikely.

Any ideas?

https://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/scratch/clangcrash/AArch64MCTargetDesc-e496dc.cpp

https://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/scratch/clangcrash/AArch64MCTargetDesc-e496dc.sh
